column.text:
• Seattle Mariners placed left fielder Randy Arozarena on the 10-day injured list with a left hamstring strain.

• Seattle Mariners placed third baseman Will Wilson on the 60-day injured list.

• Los Angeles Dodgers designated third baseman Santiago Espinal for assignment.

• New York Mets designated shortstop Vidal Bruján for assignment.

• Houston Astros activated right-hander Hunter Brown from the 60-day injured list.

• New York Mets activated right-hander Kodai Senga from the 15-day injured list.

• Baltimore Orioles activated right-hander Ryan Helsley from the 15-day injured list.

• Milwaukee Brewers sent right-hander Brandon Woodruff on a rehab assignment to the Wisconsin Timber Rattlers.

• Miami Marlins sent right-hander Eury Pérez on a rehab assignment to the Jacksonville Jumbo Shrimp.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
